title: papaver fastidiosum
intro: Papaver fastidiosum, also known as the California poppy's close relative, is a plant species found in the Western United States. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, containing alkaloids such as protopine and sanguinarine. The health benefits of Papaver fastidiosum include potential anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to its toxicity.
